About: It is about an Iranian dynasty.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Turkoman Qajar tribe.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the Qizilbash confederacy.
BuiltBy: It was built by Agha Mohammad Khan Qajar.
CausedBy: It is caused by the rise of Shahverdi Sultan.
ComposedBy: It was composed by Turkoman warriors.
ConsistsOf: It consists of a formerly aristocratic and royal Iranian dynasty.
CreatedBy: It was created by Agha Mohammad Khan Qajar.
CreatedFor: It was created for ruling Iran.
CreatedTo: It was created to unify Iran.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by the Qajar tribe.
DirectedBy: It was directed by Agha Mohammad Khan Qajar.
FoundedBy: It was founded by Agha Mohammad Khan Qajar.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by ruling Iran from 1789 until 1925.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the Safavids Empire.
IsA: It is a formerly aristocratic dynasty.
KnownAs: It is known as Dudemân-e Ǧâjâr.
KnownFor: It is known for ruling Iran.
MemberOf: It is a member of the Qizilbash confederacy.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the post-Safavid chaos.
PartOf: It is part of the Qizilbash confederacy.
UsedFor: It is used for unifying the country.
UsedTo: It is used to unify the country.
